name: 14oz Stoneware Love You Forever Stacking Mug White - Spritz™
description: Express your love to someone special with this Love You Forever Stacking Mug from Spritz™. Made of stoneware, this white mug features "Love You Forever" text in shiny gold lettering for a sweet look that will make them smile during their morning coffee. The mug also boasts a stackable design for convenient, space-saving storage. Plus, it's microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.
